indicators.name: architectural ceiling design
indicators.rationale: The complex ceiling design may cause noise and visual distraction, disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can be disruptive to sleep patterns.

indicators.name: high ceilings
indicators.rationale: High ceilings can contribute to noise and temperature fluctuations, affecting sleep quality.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene has several features that could negatively impact sleep. The complex ceiling design, large windows, and high ceilings suggest a potentially noisy and visually stimulating environment, which are not conducive to a restful sleep.
